title: The Basics of Intellectual Property — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-06-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'The Basics of Intellectual Property'. Presented by Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD). Introduces the four primary types of intellectual property (patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets), how Bayh-Dole governs IP from federally funded research, and Morgan State's IP policy and disclosure process for inventions.
